name: Kimura Co.,Ltd.
summary: Kimura Co.,Ltd. engages in the wholesale of housing materials. It is also involved in leasing and sale of real estate properties; management of home improvement centers; and the renting and assembly of scaffolding materials for construction and renovation of houses. In addition, the company engages in the glass, sash, and joinery construction activities. The company was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Sapporo, Japan.
